title: T-042 — API: Supplier + Supplier-Product Server Actions (CRUD + default enforcement)
prompt:
Implement Server Actions for Supplier CRUD and Supplier-Product assignment, backing PLN-040/041/042 UI screens.

Deliverable: Server Actions under `src/app/(planning)/suppliers/_actions/`:
- `createSupplier.ts`, `updateSupplier.ts`, `toggleSupplierActive.ts`, `listSuppliers.ts` (search + status filter, pagination)
- `assignProductToSupplier.ts`, `updateSupplierProduct.ts`, `removeSupplierProduct.ts`, `setDefaultSupplierForProduct.ts`

All actions:
- Validated by Zod schemas; reuse format validators (ISO-3166, ISO-4217, E.164) from packages/domain.
- Wrapped in `withOrgContext` to apply RLS / tenant scoping.
- RBAC: `planning.suppliers.write` for mutations, `planning.suppliers.read` for list.
- Idempotent default-supplier toggle: `setDefaultSupplierForProduct` runs in single tx — clears any existing default for (tenant_id, product_id), then sets new one (relies on partial-unique index from T-001/T-041).
- Outbox: each mutation enqueues a `supplier.*` event per existing outbox contract.

RED tests under `src/app/(planning)/suppliers/_actions/__tests__/`:
- createSupplier: invalid ISO country rejected; valid path persists row.
- setDefaultSupplierForProduct: existing default cleared atomically; concurrent invocations resolve via unique index.
- assignProductToSupplier: duplicate (supplier_id, product_id) rejected.
- listSuppliers: search by code/name, status filter (active/inactive/all) returns correct shape.

Do NOT build UI in this task. Do NOT modify schema (use T-041 result). Do NOT bypass withOrgContext.

Close-out: paste vitest output + Server Action call signatures + outbox event names.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions for supplier CRUD and supplier_products assignment with default enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: All mutations Zod-validated. Default supplier toggle uses single tx + partial-unique index. RBAC enforced via existing withOrgContext + role guards. Outbox emits supplier.created|updated|deactivated and supplier_product.assigned|updated|removed|default_changed.
acceptance_criteria: Given a payload with country='XX' (non ISO-3166), when createSupplier runs, then it returns a Zod validation error and writes nothing.
Given product P has supplier A as default, when setDefaultSupplierForProduct(P, B) runs, then A.is_default=false and B.is_default=true atomically (verified by single SELECT after).
Given two existing supplier_products rows for (S, P), when assignProductToSupplier(S, P) runs again, then it returns DUPLICATE error.
Given listSuppliers({search:'ACME', status:'active'}) is called, when run, then only active suppliers whose code or name matches 'ACME' are returned, sorted by name.
Given any mutation succeeds, when committed, then a corresponding outbox row exists with the documented event name.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/app/(planning)/suppliers/_actions/__tests__`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: Add RED unit tests for each action covering happy path + 1 negative path before implementation.
Use a transactional test fixture with seeded tenant + 2 products.
Run `pnpm vitest run` for the actions test dir.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement default toggle as 2 separate actions (race condition).
Do not call Server Actions from another action without explicit composition.
